summary: Classified current Today Continue source UI smoke coverage and identified due-today Training, carried-forward Focus, and in-progress Writing as the missing source-visibility smoke cases.

contract_status_changes.before: The UI proof roadmap named source coverage as the next class, but did not enumerate which real composer sources were covered or missing.
contract_status_changes.after: The Today domain doc now maps each `TodayContinueSourceComposer` step to current XCUITest source proof and the exact missing source-visibility cases.

contract_status_changes.before: The queued source-smoke batch used example missing sources rather than a completed classification.
contract_status_changes.after: The queued source-smoke batch is narrowed to due-today Training, carried-forward Focus, and in-progress Writing source visibility.

residual_risks: This is classification-only and does not add new UI smoke tests.
Due-today Training, carried-forward Focus, and in-progress Writing source visibility remain unproven through XCUITest until the next implementation slice.
Routing matrix, screenshots, device proof, TestFlight proof, and full UI regression coverage remain unproven.
recommended_next_reason: The source coverage triage identified exactly three missing source-visibility smoke cases; the next slice should add deterministic XCUITests for those cases only, without routing or screenshot scope.
